title: Cantilever functionalisation for AFM single molecule force spectroscopy
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fc658","text":"Four different samples were employed for experiments, designed as follows:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fqh7h","text":"HABP/HA: cantilever functionalised with hyaluronic acid binding protein, untreated cell sample;","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4pe7d","text":"BSA/HA: cantilever functionalised with bovine serum albumin, untreated cell sample;","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9unr0","text":"untreated/HA: non-functionalised cantilever, untreated cell sample;","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f3ujn","text":"HABP/HAase: cantilever functionalised with hyaluronic acid binding protein, cell sample treated with HAase","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9htoq","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2fn8v","text":"The steps of activation are listed in this protocol and were the same for Sample 1 (HABP/HA, functionalisation molecule: hyaluronic acid binding protein), Sample 2 (BSA/HA, functionalisation molecule: bovine serum albumin) and Sample 4 (HABP/HAase, functionalisation molecule: hyaluronic acid binding protein). The cantilevers used to test cells in Sample 3 (untreated/HA) were not treated.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7psho","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9c6ll","text":"Similar protocols were described in:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"73src","text":"* Maki K et al. steps: AFM cantilevers (OMCL-TR400PSA; spring constant, 0.02 N/m; curvature radius of tip, 15 nm; Olympus Co.) are oxidised using an ozone cleaner and submerged in 2% w/w (3-Aminopropyl)triethoxysilane / ultra-pure water for 15 minutes to depose (-SH) groups on the probe surface 2 , (3-Aminopropyl)triethoxysilane / ultra-pure water (3-Aminopropyl)triethoxysilane Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #440140 MilliQ Water Contributed by users 00:15:00, (3-Aminopropyl)triethoxysilane Please refer to SDS for (3-Aminopropyl)triethoxysilane https://www.sigmaaldrich.com/catalog/product/aldrich/440140?lang=en®ion=GB&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=pubchem&utm_campaign=pubchem_2017

After washing, the cantilevers are submerged in 6 mM Maleimide-C 3 -NTA / Tris-HCl buffer for 30 minutes to expose NHS esters Maleimide-C3-NTA Contributed by users Catalog #M035 0.006 , Maleimide-C3-NTA / Tris-HCl buffer Trizma® hydrochloride solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T2319 00:30:00, Maleimide-C3-NTA

After washing, the functionalisation molecule is bound to the exposed NHS ester groups by submerging the cantilever in 100 nM Hyaluronic Acid Binding Protein / Tris-HCl buffer solution (Sample 1 HABP/HA and Sample 4 HABP/HAase) or 1% w/v Bovine Serum Albumin / ultra-pure water (Sample 2 BSA/HA) for 1 hour 0.0000001 , Hyaluronic Acid Binding Protein / Tris-HCl buffer 1 , Bovine Serum Albumin / ultra-pure water Hyaluronic Acid Binding Protein, Bovine Nasal Cartilage, Biotinylated Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #385911 Trizma® hydrochloride solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T2319 MilliQ Water Contributed by users Bovine Serum Albumin Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A9647 01:00:00, Functionalisation molecule

The excess maleimide is quenched with 50 mM 2-Mercaptoethanol / ultra-pure water by submerging the cantilevers for 1 minute 2-Mercaptoethanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M3148 MilliQ Water Contributed by users 00:01:00, 2-mercaptoethanol 0.05 , 2-Mercaptoethanol / ultra-pure water Please refer to SDS for 2-Mercaptoethanol https://www.sigmaaldrich.com/catalog/product/sigma/m3148?lang=en®ion=GB
After a final wash, the functionalised cantilevers are kept submerged in ultra-pure water until mounting on the AFM holder MilliQ Water Contributed by users
creator: Stefania Marcotti
